ddls:
CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Code for each language (e.g., EN, FR, etc.) */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of each language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "loewe_fr" TEXT /* LOEWE (French) size */,
  "fr" INTEGER /* French size */,
  "it" INTEGER /* Italian size */,
  "us" TEXT /* US size */,
  "uk" INTEGER /* UK size */,
  "jp" INTEGER /* Japanese size */,
  "cn" TEXT /* Chinese size */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., tops, bottoms, etc.) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of each size */,
  "size_chart_image" TEXT /* URL of size chart image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being converted */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Size standard being converted to (e.g., US, EU, etc.) */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Conversion rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) used in the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "product_material" TEXT /* Material(s) used in the product */,
  "product_features" TEXT /* Additional features of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant (e.g., color, pattern, etc.) */,
  "variant_value" TEXT /* Value of the variant (e.g., red, blue, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of inventory (e.g., in stock, out of stock, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "default_shipping_address" TEXT /* Default shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, etc.) */,
  "order_total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, failed, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the item was shipped */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., in transit, delivered, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking record */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_tracking_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)
